  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000:0BB8 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 24159 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 0100007F:1F90 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 24160 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   2: 00000000:2775 0100007F:C350 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 24161 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
